scripts.test:gmx-invariants:stress: cross-env GMX_FUZZ_PROFILE=stress hardhat test test/gmx-invariants/vaultAccounting.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/liquidation.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/glpAum.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/sequenceDrift.spec.ts --network hardhat --show-stack-traces --no-compile
scripts.test:gmx-invariants:fork: hardhat test test/gmx-invariants/vaultAccounting.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/liquidation.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/glpAum.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/sequenceDrift.spec.ts --network hardhat
scripts.test:gmx-exploit-search: cross-env GMX_ENABLE_REAL_MUTATIONS=true hardhat test test/gmx-invariants/sequenceFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/oracleFuzz.spec.ts --network hardhat --show-stack-traces --no-compile
scripts.test:gmx-exploit-search:stress: cross-env GMX_ENABLE_REAL_MUTATIONS=true GMX_FUZZ_PROFILE=stress hardhat test test/gmx-invariants/sequenceFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/oracleFuzz.spec.ts --network hardhat --show-stack-traces --no-compile
scripts.test:gmx-exploit-search:extended: cross-env GMX_ENABLE_REAL_MUTATIONS=true hardhat test test/gmx-invariants/sequenceFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/oracleFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/glvAccounting.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/externalHandlerFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/subaccountFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/orderFeeEscape.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/withdrawalLifecycle.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/glpV1.spec.ts --network hardhat --show-stack-traces
scripts.test:gmx-exploit-search:ava: cross-env GMX_ENABLE_REAL_MUTATIONS=true GMX_CHAIN=avalanche AVALANCHE_FORK_BLOCK=80400000 hardhat test test/gmx-invariants/sequenceFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/oracleFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/glvAccounting.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/externalHandlerFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/subaccountFuzz.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/orderFeeEscape.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/withdrawalLifecycle.spec.ts test/gmx-invariants/glpV1.spec.ts --network hardhat --show-stack-traces
scripts.bounty-rotation: npm run test:gmx-exploit-search:extended && npm run triage:ci && npm run dashboard -- --db outputs/metrics/results.db --out outputs/metrics/dashboard.html
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke && npm run smoke:report
scripts.docker:billing: docker run --rm -p 3000:3000 --entrypoint npm -e STRIPE_SECRET_KEY -e STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET -e BATCH_ARCHIVE_TARGET -e DEFAULT_NOTIFY_EMAIL -e INTAKE_BASE_PATH -e INTAKES_DIR -e PORT gmx-audit:latest run billing:start
